seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name], I am writing to formally submit my resignation from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. This was not an easy decision to make, as I have truly valued my time here and the opportunities I have been given. However, after careful consideration of my long-term career goals, I have decided it is the right time for me to move on to a new challenge. I want to express my sincere gratitude for your leadership and the support you have provided me throughout my tenure.

I would like to propose that my last day of employment be [Specific Date], which will give me two weeks to ensure a smooth transition. During this period, I am fully committed to completing all my current projects and documenting my workflows for my replacement. I am also happy to assist in training a new team member or helping to wrap up any outstanding tasks before I leave. Your understanding and flexibility regarding this timeline would be greatly appreciated as I finalize my personal plans.

Thank you once again for the mentorship and professional growth I have experienced while working under your guidance. I hope to stay in touch with you and the rest of the team in the future, and I wish the company continued success in all its endeavors. Please let me know if there are any specific forms I need to complete or additional steps I should take to facilitate this process. I look forward to discussing the next steps with you at your earliest convenience.
